# What you're changing

One sentence. What zone, what file, what shifted.

---

## Why

One sentence. What triggered the change — a real customer conversation, a shipped feature, a decision that got locked, a rule you had to make.

## Impact on the reading order

Does Pocket Agent read this file in a different way after your change? If yes, note it. If no, delete this section.

## Cross-references touched

If your change touches a decision, note the decision number here. If it supersedes an old file or paragraph, note what's superseded and how.

---

## Reviewer checklist (feel free to delete before merging)

- [ ] Real over pretty — the change carries specifics, not abstractions.
- [ ] No banned voice words — quick scan of `voice/voice-spec.md` §3.
- [ ] No customer names in public parts of the repo (see `decisions/standing-rules.md` rule 1).
- [ ] No secrets committed.
- [ ] If a decision was made or reversed, `decisions/decision-log.md` reflects it.
